TextView.value: General Information
Enable: Starts or stops ManagerLoot.
Reverse: Loots everything except what’s on the list. Those items go to bags named 'loot'.
Delete leftovers: Deletes any remaining items on the corpse.
Disable when full: Turns the bot off if inventory becomes full.
Open chests: Opens containers like treasure chests, skulls, barrels. Uses lock pick if locked.
Name: The item name to match.
Exact Name: Check this if the name must match exactly.
One Each: Loots only one of each item with a unique name match
(e.g., different Symbiant types). Cannot be used with Exact Name.
Min QL: Minimum quality level to loot.
Max QL: Maximum quality level to loot.
Quantity: How many of the item to loot. 999 = infinite.
Bag Name: The name of the bag the item should be moved to.
Add: Adds the item rule to the list.
To assign a bag, rename it to anything.
Not case sensitive. Bags named a, b, c will fill in order.
Use Shared: If true, settings are saved to and loaded from the shared folder.
If false, settings are stored in the character-specific folder.
Save As Name: Enter name to save loot list as.
Default name is 'Default' if none provided.
Save: Saves the current loot list.
Dropdown: Select a saved loot list, then click Load.
Open Folder: Opens the folder where loot lists are stored.
Remove: Enter the line number and click Del to remove it.
/lm enables:disables
/printitems prints the corpse items
